name: @temps-sdk/analytics-browser
description: Vanilla JS analytics SDK for Temps. Use as a script tag or import programmatically.

scripts.build:cdn: bun build src/auto.ts --target browser --format iife --outfile dist/temps.js && bun build src/auto.ts --target browser --format iife --outfile dist/temps.min.js --minify
scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types && bun run build:cdn
scripts.test:run: bun run build && bun run test:cdn
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
